content_type: social-media post graphic with infographic chart
genre_refs: Truth Social / X post screenshot card
description: Graphic on a white background combining a social-media post card with a bar chart beneath it. At top: a circular avatar of Trump's face overlaid with the American flag, bold 'Donald J. Trump' with a magenta verified checkmark and a dark app icon, and gray '@realDonaldTrump' handle. The post body in large black sans-serif reads: 'Happy Mother's Day weekend to all, especially to the 115 THOUSAND AMERICANS who found jobs in the month of April alone! As usual, over 90 percent of Bloomberg Economists (nearly all of whom have a "Terminal" case of TRUMP DERANGEMENT SYNDROME!) underestimated the strength of the Trump Economy. Despite the best efforts of Jerome "Too Late and Won't Leave" Powell, and the America Hating Democrat Party, more Americans are working today than ever before. Happy Mother's Day and, know that, we are MAKING AMERICA WEALTHY AND SAFE AGAIN! President DONALD J. TRUMP'. Below is a column chart titled in blue 'Job Growth in April Nearly Doubles Expectations Under President Trump' with the subtitle 'Change in nonfarm employment, thousands': a tall red bar labeled '+115k' (Actual) and a shorter blue bar labeled '+65k' (Expected), with a 'Note: CEA analysis of BLS data.' footnote.
notable_text: Happy Mother's Day weekend to all, especially to the 115 THOUSAND AMERICANS who found jobs in the month of April alone! ... MAKING AMERICA WEALTHY AND SAFE AGAIN! / Job Growth in April Nearly Doubles Expectations Under President Trump — +115k Actual vs +65k Expected
